title: Authentication
summary: Sign-in, sign-up, email verification, password reset and OTP. The gate in front of the whole portal.

title: Portfolio
summary: Cross-site rollups: energy KPIs, triage and irradiation across every site a company owns.

title: Site
summary: Per-site workspace: live view, channels, energy model, hardware services and field setup.

title: Status
summary: Health and connectivity views at site, portfolio and channel level.

title: Analytics
summary: Energy accounting and performance analytics for a single site or the whole portfolio.

title: Tests
summary: Capacity tests, benchmark alignment and other commissioning checks.

title: Field Setup
summary: Gateway provisioning, networking info and installation verification in the field.

title: Settings
summary: Company, user, and hardware administration — including cell-modem plan management.
